label: positive
review: Absolutely love the new dashboard! The charts feel snappy and the CSV export saved my team hours this week. Whoever built this — thank you.

label: neutral
review: The app is fine. It does what I need most of the time, but nothing really stands out one way or the other.

label: negative-bug
review: Your checkout page crashes every time I apply a discount code. I've already lost three sales today because customers gave up and abandoned their carts.

label: negative-billing
review: I was charged twice for my Pro subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge — I have the receipts ready to forward.

label: negative-critical
review: Our entire production pipeline is down. None of our users can sign in and we are losing thousands of dollars per hour. This is completely unacceptable — fix it now.
